# Install `doku-payment` — DOKU — Indonesia Payment

> Pembayaran lokal Indonesia via DOKU — Checkout (hosted) + Direct (VA / QRIS / e-Wallet / PayLater / Minimarket / Kartu).

📚 Knowledge base : https://resource.rahmanef.com/llms.txt
📦 Slice detail   : https://resource.rahmanef.com/slices/doku-payment
🧠 JSON catalog   : https://resource.rahmanef.com/api/knowledge?slice=doku-payment
🤖 Prompt page    : https://resource.rahmanef.com/agents/doku-payment

## 1. Install

```bash
npx rahman-resources add doku-payment
# alias: npx rr add doku-payment
```

## 2. What it ships

- tags: `payment`, `doku`, `indonesia`, `qris`, `virtual-account`, `ewallet`, `checkout`

## 3. Wire it up

Run `npx rr add doku-payment`. DOKU dual-mode: Checkout (hosted, all channels) atau Direct (single channel, returns VA/QRIS/deeplink). Webhook di /webhooks/doku verify HMAC-SHA256 (canonical: Client-Id + Request-Id + Request-Timestamp + Request-Target + Digest). Idempotency by request_id index. Server-only — no NEXT_PUBLIC_*. Sandbox default (api-sandbox.doku.com); flip DOKU_IS_PRODUCTION=true for live.

## Rules of engagement

- shadcn-only UI primitives. No raw `<button>` / `<dialog>` / native date or file inputs.
- 200-line hard cap per source file (extract neighbours when over).
- All Convex queries hit an index (`.withIndex(...)`); never bare `.collect()`.
- Public mutations/queries declare `args:` validators + authz.
- Full ruleset: https://resource.rahmanef.com/best-practice
